turns.text: Can Browser AI Companion expose local research to Claude Code and Codex CLI with MCP?
turns.formattedText: Can Browser AI Companion expose local research to Claude Code and Codex CLI with MCP?

turns.text: Yes. Start with a read-only stdio MCP server that reads local vault notes, provider captures, and recall indexes.
turns.formattedText: Yes. Start with a read-only stdio MCP server that reads local vault notes, provider captures, and recall indexes.

artifacts.title: Stdio validation checklist
artifacts.text: Validate listTools, callTool, and context pack consumption in both clients.
artifacts.formattedText:
# Stdio validation checklist

- listTools
- callTool
- context pack

turns.text: What should BAC hide when the user is screen sharing?
turns.formattedText: What should BAC hide when the user is screen sharing?

turns.text: Mask URLs, emails, and token-like strings in recall snippets, context packs, and audit previews.
turns.formattedText: Mask URLs, emails, and token-like strings in recall snippets, context packs, and audit previews.

turns.text: What is the cleanest config path for a local MCP server POC?
turns.formattedText: What is the cleanest config path for a local MCP server POC?

turns.text: Use a single JSON config file so Claude Code and Codex CLI can launch the same command with the same vault and capture paths.
turns.formattedText: Use a single JSON config file so Claude Code and Codex CLI can launch the same command with the same vault and capture paths.
